title: Complete the TaskBounty V2 frontend participant lifecycle
description: Extend the deployed Coston2 frontend workflow from Creator-funded task creation through Worker acceptance and immutable result submission, while keeping final payment evidence separate from the Worker deliverable.
deliverables: A version-pinned Task #2 result manifest containing the Worker deliverables
Frontend controls that simulate and review acceptTask and submitWork before requesting a wallet signature
Public Coston2 receipt and event evidence for the Worker acceptance and result submission
acceptanceCriteria: The Creator deposits exactly 1000000 FTestXRP units into TaskBounty V2 for Task #2
The Worker accepts Task #2 from the dedicated Worker test account
The submitted resultURI is version-pinned and its exact bytes match resultHash
The frontend verifies the expected TaskCreated, TaskAccepted, and WorkSubmitted events
The Worker deliverable does not require the future approveTask transaction hash
Final payment evidence is generated separately after Creator approval
